intent.value: Capture free-form text from the user with clear label, state feedback, and slot-based composition.

value: InputHelper for character count and helper actions
interactive controls inside start2 or end2 text slots
dense list rows — use inline-edit pattern instead
dense form grids — default shape is more compact

props.name: label
props.description: Label text rendered above the input. Recommended for all form fields.

props.name: size
props.description: Input size — f-step number or t-shirt alias. 6=XS, 8=S, 10=M (default), 12=L.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent appearance role. 'auto' resolves to 'secondary'. Use role-specific appearances for contextual feedback.

props.name: shape
props.description: Corner radius shape. 'pill' applies full rounding — use for search bars and hero inputs.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value. Use with onChange for controlled inputs.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default value for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new value string whenever the input changes.

props.name: start
props.description: Leading content slot — Icon, IconButton, Avatar, Image, ChipGroup, or custom node.

props.name: start2
props.description: Second leading content slot — Text prefix (e.g. currency symbol, country code).

props.name: end
props.description: Trailing content slot — IconButton (clear, reveal password), Icon, Button, or custom node.

props.name: end2
props.description: Second trailing content slot — Text suffix (e.g. unit, domain), Icon, or IconButton.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input. Applies disabled opacity and blocks interaction.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Makes the input read-only. User can select/copy but not type.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required. Appends '*' to the label.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Applies the error border color. Typically controlled by validation state.

props.name: error
props.description: Shorthand for showing an InputFeedback with variant='negative'. Overridden by the feedback prop.

props.name: feedback
props.description: Rich feedback content — overrides the error prop. Use InputFeedback for full control.

props.name: dynamicText
props.description: Dynamic text rendered in InputHelper below the input (character count, hints).

props.name: helperButton
props.description: Helper action rendered on the right side of InputHelper (link, button).

props.name: description
props.description: Descriptive text rendered below the label.

props.name: infoIcon
props.description: Shows an info icon next to the label.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches the field to fill its container width.

props.name: type
props.description: HTML input type attribute: text, email, password, number, tel, url, search.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name for form submission.

props.name: id
props.description: HTML id for the input element. Auto-generated if not provided.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: HTML autocomplete attribute.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Autofocuses the input on mount.

props.name: validationMode
props.description: When to run the validate function. Default: 'onBlur'.

props.name: validate
props.description: Custom validation function. Return a string (or string[]) for error, null for valid.

props.name: onKeyDown
props.description: Keydown event handler.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Blur event handler.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Focus event handler.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name applied to the field root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the field root.

codeSnippets.title: Basic Usage
codeSnippets.code:
import { InputField } from '@oneui/ui/components/Input';

<InputField
  label="Email"
  placeholder="you@example.com"
  type="email"
/>

codeSnippets.title: Controlled
With Slots
With Validation
codeSnippets.code: (v as string).length < 8 ? 'Minimum 8 characters' : null} validationMode="onBlur" dynamicText={`${value.length}/32`} helperButton={Forgot?} />

codeSnippets.title: Appearance Roles
codeSnippets.code:
// Semantic color roles for contextual feedback
<InputField appearance="positive" label="Username" />
<InputField appearance="negative" label="Password" error="Invalid credentials" />
<InputField appearance="warning" label="Phone" />
<InputField appearance="informative" label="Search" />

generatedMarkdown: # Input Machine-Readable Documentation _Generated from source metadata. Do not edit manually._ ## Intent and Purpose - **Intent**: Capture free-form text from the user with clear label, state feedback, and slot-based composition. - **Task contexts**: form-entry, search, inline-edit, settings - **Sentiments**: neutral, informative, positive, negative ## Composition Rules - **Requires**: label or aria-label for accessibility, input element inside container - **Allows**: start slot (icon, avatar, chip group), start2 slot (prefix text, currency), end2 slot (suffix text, unit), end slot (icon button, clear button), InputFeedback for validation messages, InputHelper for character count and helper actions - **Forbids**: interactive controls inside start2 or end2 text slots, nesting Input inside another Input ## Variant Logic - **default (outlined)**: use when standard form fields, search bars, settings inputs; pair with InputFeedback for validation, InputHelper for hints - **pill shape**: use when search bars, hero inputs, brand-defining moments; pair with search icon in start slot, clear button in end slot ## Relationships and Dependencies - **Related**: Select, NumberField, Textarea, InputFeedback, InputHelper - **Escalates to**: Dialog with form, Drawer with form - **Degrades to**: plain text display - **Groups with**: Button (submit), InputFeedback, InputHelper, InputField ## Context Signals - **Density**: compact, default, open - **Modality**: desktop, mobile, web - **Brand**: shape recipe-driven, corner radius per brand - **Mode**: light, dark, surface-context ## Observability Hooks - **Track**: focus, blur, change, submit - **Health**: validation_error_rate, empty_submission_rate, a11y_violations ## Props | Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `label` | `string` | No | - | Label text rendered above the input. | | `size` | `6 \| 8 \| 10 \| 12 \| 'xs' \| 's' \| 'm' \| 'l'` | No | 10 | Input size — f-step number or t-shirt alias. | | `appearance` | `InputAppearance` | No | auto | Multi-accent appearance role. | | `shape` | `'default' \| 'pill'` | No | default | Corner radius shape. | | `placeholder` | `string` | No | - | Placeholder text. | | `value` | `string` | No | - | Controlled value. | | `defaultValue` | `string` | No | - | Default value (uncontrolled). | | `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | No | - | Called on every change. | | `start` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Leading slot — icon, avatar, chip group. | | `start2` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Leading text slot — prefix, currency symbol. | | `end` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Trailing slot — icon button, clear, reveal. | | `end2` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Trailing text slot — suffix, unit. | | `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | Disables the input. | | `readOnly` | `boolean` | No | - | Read-only mode. | | `required` | `boolean` | No | - | Marks field as required, appends '*' to label. | | `invalid` | `boolean` | No | - | Applies error border. | | `error` | `string` | No | - | Shorthand negative feedback message. | | `feedback` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Rich feedback — overrides error. | | `dynamicText` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Helper area left text (character count). | | `helperButton` | `ReactNode` | No | - | Helper area right action. | | `description` | `string` | No | - | Description below label. | | `infoIcon` | `boolean` | No | - | Shows info icon beside label. | | `fullWidth` | `boolean` | No | - | Stretch to container width. | | `type` | `string` | No | text | HTML input type. | | `name` | `string` | No | - | Field name for forms. | | `validationMode` | `'onBlur' \| 'onChange'` | No | onBlur | When to run validate. | | `validate` | `(value: unknown) => string \| string[] \| null` | No | - | Custom validation function. | | `className` | `string` | No | - | Additional class name. | | `style` | `CSSProperties` | No | - | Inline styles. | ## Slots | Slot | Types | Tokens | | --- | --- | --- | | `start` | icon, iconButton, avatar, image, chipGroup, custom | `iconSize` | | `start2` | text | - | | `end` | iconButton, icon, button, custom | `iconSize` | | `end2` | text, icon, iconButton | - | ## Recipe Decisions - **Shape** (cornerRadius) ## Code Snippets ### Basic Usage ```tsx import { InputField } from '@oneui/ui/components/Input'; ``` ### Controlled ```tsx const [value, setValue] = useState(''); ``` ### With Slots ```tsx import { InputField } from '@oneui/ui/components/Input'; import { Icon } from '@oneui/ui/components/Icon'; } start2="USD" end2=".00" end={} placeholder="0" /> ``` ### With Validation ```tsx (v as string).length < 8 ? 'Minimum 8 characters' : null} validationMode="onBlur" dynamicText={`${value.length}/32`} helperButton={Forgot?} /> ``` ### Appearance Roles ```tsx ```
